entries.source_text: い、１杯ぐらいなら大丈夫です
entries.vi_text: Một Ly Thì Chắc Là Không Sao
entries.ja_source: い、１杯ぐらいなら大丈夫です

entries.source_text: <size=48>——Several days later.</size>
entries.vi_text: <size=48>――Vài Ngày Sau</size>
entries.ja_source: <size=48>――数日後</size>
entries.en_reference: <size=48>——Several days later.</size>

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text:
Now then... I'm running a bit low on medicine，so I'll need to request a
restock.
entries.vi_text:
Còn nữa… thuốc cũng vơi đi một chút
rồi nên mình phải nhờ bổ sung thêm.
entries.ja_source:
あとは……ちょっとお薬が減っているので、
補充をお願いしないと。
entries.en_reference:
Now then... I'm running a bit low on medicine, so I'll need to request a
restock.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Whew，with so few injured today，the cleanup's been going smoothly.
entries.vi_text: Phù‚ hôm nay ít người bị thương nên việc dọn dẹp cũng thuận lợi thật đấy~.
entries.ja_source:
ふう、今日は怪我をした人が少なくて、
後片付けがはかどりますね～。
entries.en_reference: Whew, with so few injured today, the cleanup's been going smoothly.

entries.source_text:
A voice came from behind Noemi as she was tidying up alone in the
treatment room.
entries.vi_text:
Một giọng nói vang lên từ phía sau Noemi khi
cô đang dọn dẹp một mình trong phòng điều trị.
entries.ja_source: １人、治療所で片付けをするノエミの後ろから声がかけられた。
entries.en_reference:
A voice came from behind Noemi as she was tidying up alone in the
treatment room.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
Well，of course not. The victory celebration's in full swing at the
tavern.
entries.vi_text:
Dĩ nhiên là chẳng ai đến rồi. Bây giờ
ở quán rượu đang giữa lúc tiệc mừng mà.
entries.ja_source:
そりゃ誰も来ないさ。
今は酒場で、宴の真っ最中だからな。
entries.en_reference:
Well, of course not. The victory celebration's in full swing at the
tavern.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Ah... Lord Commander.
entries.vi_text: A… Chỉ Huy.
entries.ja_source: あ……司令官さま。
entries.en_reference: Ah... Lord Commander.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
It's a celebration for the end of the battle. No wonder no one's
coming for treatment.
entries.vi_text:
Tiệc mừng vì trận chiến đã tạm khép lại. Chắc
mọi người không có tâm trí đến đây chữa trị đâu.
entries.ja_source:
戦闘に区切りのついたお祝いだ。
治療を受けに来てる場合じゃないんだろうな。
entries.en_reference:
It's a celebration for the end of the battle. No wonder no one's
coming for treatment.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text:
T-that's right! Even though the celebration's still going on，shouldn't
you be there，Lord Commander?
entries.vi_text:
Đ-đúng vậy! Đang lúc mọi người ăn mừng mà
Chỉ Huy không tham gia thì có ổn không ạ~?
entries.ja_source:
そ、そうですよ！　お祝いをしている最中なのに、
司令官さまが参加しなくていいんですか～？
entries.en_reference:
T-that's right! Even though the celebration's still going on, shouldn't
you be there, Lord Commander?

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
I already showed my face. But I thought it was a waste for one of the
stars to be missing.
entries.vi_text:
Anh đã ghé qua rồi. Nhưng anh thấy hơi tiếc
khi thiếu mất một trong những nhân vật chính.
entries.ja_source:
もう顔は出したよ。
だが立役者の１人が欠けてるってのはもったいないと思ってな。
entries.en_reference:
I already showed my face. But I thought it was a waste for one of the
stars to be missing.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Star...?
entries.vi_text: Nhân vật chính… là sao ạ…?
entries.ja_source: 立役者、って……？
entries.en_reference: Star...?

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
You're the one who did so much in that battle. Everyone's waiting for
you.
entries.vi_text:
Người đã lập công trong trận vừa rồi là
Noemi mà. Mọi người đều đang chờ em đấy.
entries.ja_source:
この前の戦いで活躍したのはノエミだろう。
みんなノエミを待っていたぞ。
entries.en_reference:
You're the one who did so much in that battle. Everyone's waiting for
you.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: B-but，I'd probably ruin the atmosphere. I，um... I can't really drink...
entries.vi_text: N-nhưng chắc em sẽ làm hỏng bầu không khí mất. Em thì… chuyện rượu hơi…
entries.ja_source:
で、でも、きっと雰囲気を悪くしてしまいますよ。
私は、その……お酒がちょっと……
entries.en_reference: B-but, I'd probably ruin the atmosphere. I, um... I can't really drink...

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
Really? I saw you chatting with Ludia，so I figured you visited the
tavern often.
entries.vi_text:
Vậy sao? Anh thấy em nói chuyện với
Ludia nên cứ tưởng em hay đến quán rượu.
entries.ja_source:
そうなのか？
ルディアと話していたから、よく酒場に行っているのかと思ったが。
entries.en_reference:
Really? I saw you chatting with Ludia, so I figured you visited the
tavern often.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Y-you were watching?! W-well，you see...!
entries.vi_text: A-anh thấy rồi ạ!? C-c-cái đó là…!
entries.ja_source:
み、見てたんですか！？
そそ、それはですね……っ！
entries.en_reference: Y-you were watching?! W-well, you see...!

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: I do go to the tavern occasionally，but certainly not often，I—!
entries.vi_text: Đúng là em thỉnh thoảng có đến quán rượu nhưng tuyệt đối không thường xuyên đâu‚ ừm…!
entries.ja_source:
確かに酒場には行ったりもするんですが、
決して頻繁にではなくて、あのっ！
entries.en_reference: I do go to the tavern occasionally, but certainly not often, I—!

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
It's fine. Don't worry about it. There's nothing wrong with not being
able to drink.
entries.vi_text:
Không sao đâu‚ đừng bận tâm. Không uống
được rượu cũng chẳng có gì xấu cả.
entries.ja_source:
いいんだ、気にするな。
飲めないからって何も悪くはない。
entries.en_reference:
It's fine. Don't worry about it. There's nothing wrong with not being
able to drink.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Lord Commander...
entries.vi_text: Chỉ Huy…
entries.ja_source: 司令官さま……
entries.en_reference: Lord Commander...

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Then I'll drink here.
entries.vi_text: Vậy thì anh sẽ uống ở đây.
entries.ja_source: それなら俺は、ここで飲むとするよ。
entries.en_reference: Then I'll drink here.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text:
What?! Lord Commander，please go to the tavern! Everyone will be
lonely without you!
entries.vi_text:
Ơơ!? Chỉ Huy hãy đến quán rượu
đi ạ! Mọi người sẽ buồn lắm đó~!
entries.ja_source:
ええ！？　司令官さまは酒場に行ってください！
皆さん寂しがりますよ～！
entries.en_reference:
What?! Lord Commander, please go to the tavern! Everyone will be
lonely without you!

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
It's fine. I'm the Commander and you're the star，so this is the party，
right?
entries.vi_text:
Không sao mà. Có anh là Chỉ Huy và Noemi là nhân vật chính
ở đây thì nơi này chính là tiệc mừng rồi‚ đúng không?
entries.ja_source:
いいんだよ。
司令官の俺と主役のノエミがいるんだ、ここが宴の場だろ？
entries.en_reference:
It's fine. I'm the Commander and you're the star, so this is the party,
right?

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Lord Commander... thank you so much.
entries.vi_text: Chỉ Huy… cảm ơn anh rất nhiều.
entries.ja_source: 司令官さま……ありがとうございます。
entries.en_reference: Lord Commander... thank you so much.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
If anything，I'm the one who gets to keep Noemi all to myself. They'll
be jealous.
entries.vi_text:
Thậm chí anh còn lời vì được giữ Noemi cho
riêng mình ấy chứ. Bọn họ sẽ ghen tị lắm.
entries.ja_source:
むしろノエミを独占できて得かもな。
あいつら、羨ましがるぞ。
entries.en_reference:
If anything, I'm the one who gets to keep Noemi all to myself. They'll
be jealous.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Geez，that's not true...
entries.vi_text: Thôi mà~ không có chuyện đó đâu ạ~.
entries.ja_source: も～、そんなことないですよ～。
entries.en_reference: Geez, that's not true...

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: But，um，it's not that I can't drink at all...
entries.vi_text: Chỉ là… ừm… không phải em hoàn toàn không uống được rượu đâu…
entries.ja_source:
ただ、その、ですね。
私は別に、お酒が飲めないというわけでは……
entries.en_reference: But, um, it's not that I can't drink at all...

entries.speaker: 兵士Ａ
entries.source_text: Ah，Miss Noemi! Commander too! So this is where you were!
entries.vi_text: A‚ cô Noemi! Cả Chỉ Huy nữa! Hai người ở đây sao!
entries.ja_source:
あ、ノエミさん！　司令官も！
こんなところにいたんですか！
entries.en_reference: Ah, Miss Noemi! Commander too! So this is where you were!

entries.speaker: 兵士Ｂ
entries.source_text: Everyone's waiting! Come on，to the tavern!
entries.vi_text: Mọi người đang chờ đấy! Nào‚ ra quán rượu thôi!
entries.ja_source: みんな待ってるぜ！　ほら、酒場に！
entries.en_reference: Everyone's waiting! Come on, to the tavern!

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Everyone! You came all the way here...
entries.vi_text: Mọi người!? Còn đến tận đây nữa…
entries.ja_source:
皆さんっ！？
こんなところまで……
entries.en_reference: Everyone! You came all the way here...

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Oops，our private party's been busted... Well，what now?
entries.vi_text: Ôi chà‚ tiệc riêng hiếm có bị phát hiện mất rồi. …Nào‚ em tính sao?
entries.ja_source:
おっと、せっかくの宴が見つかっちまったな。
……さて、どうする？
entries.en_reference: Oops, our private party's been busted... Well, what now?

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text:
Fufufu，I suppose there's no helping it. Let's go together，Lord
Commander.
entries.vi_text:
Fufufu‚ vậy thì hết cách rồi.
Đi cùng nhau nhé‚ Chỉ Huy.
entries.ja_source:
ふふふ、しかたありませんね。
一緒に行きましょう、司令官さま。
entries.en_reference:
Fufufu, I suppose there's no helping it. Let's go together, Lord
Commander.

entries.speaker: ルディア
entries.source_text: Everyone! The star of the show has arrived!
entries.vi_text: Mọi người ơi! Nhân vật chính xuất hiện rồi đây!
entries.ja_source: 皆さーん！　主役の登場よー！
entries.en_reference: Everyone! The star of the show has arrived!

entries.speaker: 兵士Ａ
entries.source_text: Whoooa! Miss Noemiiii!
entries.vi_text: Uoooo! Cô Noemi!
entries.ja_source: うおおおお！　ノエミさーん！
entries.en_reference: Whoooa! Miss Noemiiii!

entries.speaker: 兵士Ｃ
entries.source_text: Our goddess! You finally made it!
entries.vi_text: Nữ thần của bọn tôi! Cuối cùng cô cũng đến rồi!
entries.ja_source:
俺らの女神ー！
やっと来てくれたかー！
entries.en_reference: Our goddess! You finally made it!

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: I haven't done anything to deserve this kind of welcome!
entries.vi_text: Em đâu có làm gì đáng để được chào đón như vậy đâu ạ~!?
entries.ja_source:
そんなに歓迎してもらうようなこと、
私はしてないですよ～！？
entries.en_reference: I haven't done anything to deserve this kind of welcome!

entries.speaker: 兵士Ａ
entries.source_text: What are you talking about，you're the star! Come on，first drink!
entries.vi_text: Nhân vật chính mà nói gì vậy chứ! Nào nào‚ trước hết một ly đã!
entries.ja_source:
主役が何を言ってるんですか！
ほらほら、まずは１杯！
entries.en_reference: What are you talking about, you're the star! Come on, first drink!

entries.speaker: 兵士Ｃ
entries.source_text: There's some here too! Come on，drink up，Noemi!
entries.vi_text: Bên này cũng có đây! Nào uống đi‚ Noemi!
entries.ja_source:
こっちもあるぞ！
さあ飲んでくれ、ノエミちゃん！
entries.en_reference: There's some here too! Come on, drink up, Noemi!

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Wait，wait，that's no good. Noemi and alcohol...!
entries.vi_text: Khoan khoan‚ cái đó không được. Noemi với rượu thì…!
entries.ja_source:
待て待て、それはダメだ。
ノエミは酒が……！
entries.en_reference: Wait, wait, that's no good. Noemi and alcohol...!

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: No，I'll be fine. I can handle my drink.
entries.vi_text: Không sao đâu ạ. Em sẽ uống đàng hoàng mà.
entries.ja_source:
いえ、大丈夫です。
私、ちゃんと飲みますから。
entries.en_reference: No, I'll be fine. I can handle my drink.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Are you sure? You don't have to push yourself.
entries.vi_text: Ổn thật chứ? Em không cần phải cố chịu đâu.
entries.ja_source: いいのか？　我慢しなくていいんだぞ？
entries.en_reference: Are you sure? You don't have to push yourself.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: I-I'll be fine with one drink. I should be okay.
entries.vi_text: M-một ly thì chắc là không sao đâu ạ. Chắc em sẽ ổn mà…
entries.ja_source:
い、１杯ぐらいなら大丈夫です、
平気なはずですから……
entries.en_reference: I-I'll be fine with one drink. I should be okay.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: You seem strangely desperate... I have a bad feeling about this.
entries.vi_text: Em có vẻ quyết tâm kỳ lạ quá… Anh hơi có linh cảm chẳng lành.
entries.ja_source:
なんだか妙な必死さがあるな……。
ちょっと嫌な予感がするんだが。
entries.en_reference: You seem strangely desperate... I have a bad feeling about this.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: I told you，I'm fine! Cheers!
entries.vi_text: Em đã nói ổn là ổn mà! Em xin phép uống ạ!
entries.ja_source:
平気と言ったら平気なんです！
いただきますっ！
entries.en_reference: I told you, I'm fine! Cheers!

entries.source_text:
Noemi took the glass of alcohol and slowly，without pausing，drank it
all down.
entries.vi_text:
Noemi cầm lấy chiếc ly đã rót rượu rồi chậm
rãi nhưng không hề dừng lại mà uống cạn.
entries.ja_source:
ノエミは酒の注がれたグラスを手に取ると、
ゆっくりと、しかし止まることなく飲み干した。
entries.en_reference:
Noemi took the glass of alcohol and slowly, without pausing, drank it
all down.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Mmm... *sigh*... That was lovely. Thank you.
entries.vi_text: Ưm… hà… Cảm ơn vì ly rượu ạ~.
entries.ja_source:
ん……はぁ……。
ごちそうさまです～。
entries.en_reference: Mmm... *sigh*... That was lovely. Thank you.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Whoa，hey now! You drank the whole thing?! Don't push yourself!
entries.vi_text: N-này này này! Em uống hết thật à!? Đừng cố quá đấy!
entries.ja_source:
お、おいおいおい！　全部飲んだのか！？
無理するなよ！？
entries.en_reference: Whoa, hey now! You drank the whole thing?! Don't push yourself!

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text:
No，no，I'm f-fine with this much. So... juss one more... juss one
more...
entries.vi_text:
Không không‚ từng này thì em vẫn ổn. Vậy
nên… thêm một ly… chỉ một ly nữa thôi…
entries.ja_source:
いえいえ、このぐらいなら平気です。
なので……もう１杯……もう１杯だけ……
entries.en_reference:
No, no, I'm f-fine with this much. So... juss one more... juss one
more...

entries.source_text:
Noemi grabbed the next glass and downed it even faster than the
first.
entries.vi_text:
Noemi cầm ly tiếp theo lên và uống
cạn còn nhanh hơn ly đầu tiên.
entries.ja_source:
ノエミは次のグラスを取り、
１杯目よりもさらに早く飲み干してしまった。
entries.en_reference:
Noemi grabbed the next glass and downed it even faster than the
first.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: *gulp*，*gulp*... *sigh*... That's wonderful.
entries.vi_text: Ực‚ ực… Haaa… tuyệt thật đấy…
entries.ja_source:
んっく、んっく……。
ふぁぁ……いいですねぇ……
entries.en_reference: *gulp*, *gulp*... *sigh*... That's wonderful.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
That's two already，you know? Your face is all red，maybe you should
stop at...
entries.vi_text:
Đã hai ly rồi đấy? Mặt em cũng đỏ
lên rồi‚ tốt hơn nên dừng ở đây thì…
entries.ja_source:
もう２杯だぞ？
顔も赤くなってるし、このぐらいにしておいたほうが……
entries.en_reference:
That's two already, you know? Your face is all red, maybe you should
stop at...

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: I'm fiiine! Juss a bit more，juss a little more...
entries.vi_text: Em ổn mà~! Thêm chút nữa thôi‚ chỉ thêm một chút nữa…
entries.ja_source:
だーいじょうぶです～！
もう少し、もーちょっとだけ……
entries.en_reference: I'm fiiine! Juss a bit more, juss a little more...

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Ah，hey!
entries.vi_text: A‚ này!
entries.ja_source: あ、おいっ！
entries.en_reference: Ah, hey!

entries.source_text:
Noemi grabbed the glass placed in front of the Commander and
tossed it back in one go.
entries.vi_text:
Noemi cầm lấy chiếc ly đặt trước mặt Chỉ
Huy rồi ngửa cổ tu một hơi đầy khí thế.
entries.ja_source:
ノエミはの前に置かれたグラスを取り、
ぐっと勢いよく喉に流し込んでいく。
entries.en_reference:
Noemi grabbed the glass placed in front of the Commander and
tossed it back in one go.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text:
*glug*，*glug*，*glug*... mmm，so good! Celebratory booze really is the
best!
entries.vi_text:
Ực ực ực… ưm~ ngon quá! Rượu
mừng đúng là tuyệt nhất~!
entries.ja_source:
ごっきゅごっきゅごっきゅ……ん～、おいしいっ！
お祝いのお酒って最高ですね～！
entries.en_reference:
*glug*, *glug*, *glug*... mmm, so good! Celebratory booze really is the
best!

entries.speaker: 兵士Ａ
entries.source_text: Hey，Noemi，aren't you drinking an awful lot...?
entries.vi_text: Này‚ cô Noemi uống nhiều quá rồi thì phải…?
entries.ja_source: なあ、ノエミさん、めっちゃ飲んでないか……？
entries.en_reference: Hey, Noemi, aren't you drinking an awful lot...?

entries.speaker: 兵士Ｂ
entries.source_text:
Maybe she's got a hidden tolerance. Still，she's going at quite a
pace...
entries.vi_text:
Có khi tửu lượng cô ấy mạnh ngoài
dự đoán. Nhưng mà khí thế hơi…
entries.ja_source:
意外とイケる口なのかもな。
にしても、ちょっと勢いが……
entries.en_reference:
Maybe she's got a hidden tolerance. Still, she's going at quite a
pace...

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text:
Another round! One more! No，actually，I'm juss gonna finish them all
anyway，so bring me about three!
entries.vi_text:
Thêm rượu‚ một ly nữa~! Không‚ dù sao em cũng uống
hết thôi nên mang khoảng ba ly đến đây đi ạ~!
entries.ja_source:
おかわり、もう１杯～！
いえ、どうせ空けちゃうので３杯ぐらい持ってきてくださ～い！
entries.en_reference:
Another round! One more! No, actually, I'm juss gonna finish them all
anyway, so bring me about three!

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Hurry! Hurry it uppp!
entries.vi_text: Nhanh lên! Nha~nh lê~n nào!!!
entries.ja_source: はやく！　は～や～くぅ～！！！
entries.en_reference: Hurry! Hurry it uppp!

entries.speaker: 兵士Ａ
entries.source_text: Y-you're still going to drink? Are you okay，Noemi?
entries.vi_text: V-vẫn uống tiếp sao!? Cô ổn chứ‚ cô Noemi!?
entries.ja_source:
ま、まだ飲むんですか！？
大丈夫ですか、ノエミさん！？
entries.en_reference: Y-you're still going to drink? Are you okay, Noemi?

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text:
I'm toootally fine! This is a celebration，so let's drink and drink and
drink!
entries.vi_text:
Em ổn mà! Đang tiệc mừng thì
phải uống nhiều hơn nữa chứ!
entries.ja_source:
だいじょーぶです！
お祝いなんだからもっともっと飲みましょう！
entries.en_reference:
I'm toootally fine! This is a celebration, so let's drink and drink and
drink!

entries.speaker: 兵士Ｂ
entries.source_text: Still，that's a bit...
entries.vi_text: Dù vậy thì hơi…!
entries.ja_source: にしたって、ちょっと……！
entries.en_reference: Still, that's a bit...

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: C'mooon! More! More! Bring more booze，pleeeease!
entries.vi_text: Nào! Thêm nữa! Thêm nữa đi! Mang thêm rượu đến đây cho em với!!!
entries.ja_source:
ほらあ！　もっとぉ！　もっとです！
もっとお酒を持ってきてくださーい！！！
entries.en_reference: C'mooon! More! More! Bring more booze, pleeeease!

entries.source_text:
Noemi lightly slapped the table and let out a cheerful laugh. The sight
of her was nothing short of a troublesome drunk.
entries.vi_text:
Noemi vỗ bồm bộp lên bàn và bật cười vui vẻ. Nhìn thế nào
đi nữa thì cô cũng chỉ là một con sâu rượu phiền phức.
entries.ja_source:
ノエミはぺちぺちとテーブルを叩き、陽気な笑い声を上げた。
その様子はどう見ても、厄介な酔っぱらいでしかなかった。
entries.en_reference:
Noemi lightly slapped the table and let out a cheerful laugh. The sight
of her was nothing short of a troublesome drunk.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: What the hell is this!?
entries.vi_text: Chuyện này là sao vậy!?
entries.ja_source: どうなってるんだ、これは！？
entries.en_reference: What the hell is this!?

entries.speaker: ルディア
entries.source_text: Oh，here she goes again...
entries.vi_text: À‚ lại bắt đầu rồi nhỉ…
entries.ja_source: ああ、また始まったわね……
entries.en_reference: Oh, here she goes again...

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Wait，Ludia，is this a regular thing?
entries.vi_text: Không lẽ Ludia‚ chuyện này xảy ra thường xuyên à?
entries.ja_source: まさかルディア、これはいつものことなのか？
entries.en_reference: Wait, Ludia, is this a regular thing?

entries.speaker: ルディア
entries.source_text:
Yeah. Actually，she gets wild when she drinks. At first she holds
back，but once she starts she can't stop.
entries.vi_text:
Ừ. Thật ra cô bé ấy là kiểu say vào sẽ quậy tưng bừng. Ban đầu thì ngại
nên không uống nhưng một khi đã bắt đầu thì không dừng lại được đâu.
entries.ja_source:
ええ。実はあの子、酒乱なのよ。
最初は遠慮して飲まないけど、１度飲み始めたら止まらないんだから。
entries.en_reference:
Yeah. Actually, she gets wild when she drinks. At first she holds back,
but once she starts she can't stop.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
...I see. So she refused to come to the party not because she can't
drink，but because she gets like this.
entries.vi_text:
…Ra là vậy. Cô ấy từ chối đến tiệc không phải vì
không uống được mà vì hễ uống vào sẽ thành ra thế này.
entries.ja_source:
……なるほどな。宴に来るのを断ったのは酒が飲めないからじゃなく、
飲んだらこうなるから、か。
entries.en_reference:
...I see. So she refused to come to the party not because she can't
drink, but because she gets like this.

entries.speaker: ルディア
entries.source_text:
Her tab always builds up too. I have to collect it secretly during the
day.
entries.vi_text:
Lần nào tiền rượu cũng bị ghi nợ ấy mà.
Ban ngày tôi phải lén đi thu lại đó.
entries.ja_source:
いつも飲み代はツケになっちゃってねー。
昼間にこっそり回収してるのよ。
entries.en_reference:
Her tab always builds up too. I have to collect it secretly during the
day.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
So that's what you were talking about back then. No wonder you
couldn't say it out loud.
entries.vi_text:
Hóa ra khi ấy hai người nói chuyện
này. Bảo sao không thể nói to được.
entries.ja_source:
あの時に話していたのはこれか。
そりゃ大きな声では言えないわけだ。
entries.en_reference:
So that's what you were talking about back then. No wonder you
couldn't say it out loud.

entries.speaker: ルディア
entries.source_text:
Still，she's really drunk today. I wonder if she's been building up a lot
of stress.
entries.vi_text:
Dù vậy hôm nay cô ấy say khá nặng nhỉ. Không biết
có phải đã dồn nén nhiều căng thẳng lắm không.
entries.ja_source:
それにしても、今日はかなり酔ってるわね。
ずいぶんとストレスをためてたのかしら。
entries.en_reference:
Still, she's really drunk today. I wonder if she's been building up a lot
of stress.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: ...Perfect. Let's have her get it all out here.
entries.vi_text: …Vừa hay. Hãy để cô ấy nói hết ra ở đây đi.
entries.ja_source:
……ちょうどいいな。
ここで全部吐き出してもらおうじゃないか。
entries.en_reference: ...Perfect. Let's have her get it all out here.

entries.source_text:
Surrounded by the men，Noemi stood up abruptly and raised her
glass.
entries.vi_text:
Noemi bị những người đàn ông vây
quanh liền bật dậy và giơ cao ly rượu.
entries.ja_source:
周囲を男たちに囲まれたノエミは、
ぱっと立ち上がってグラスをかかげる。
entries.en_reference: Surrounded by the men, Noemi stood up abruptly and raised her glass.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Lissen up，everrryone! I'm—I've had it! I can't take it anymore!
entries.vi_text: Nghe đây chưa ạ‚ mọi người! Em ấy mà~! Đã chịu hết nổi rồi!
entries.ja_source:
いーですかぁ、みなさん！
わたしはも～！　がまんの限界ですっ！
entries.en_reference: Lissen up, everrryone! I'm—I've had it! I can't take it anymore!

entries.speaker: 兵士Ｃ
entries.source_text: Whoa!
entries.vi_text: Ồồ!?
entries.ja_source: おおっ！？
entries.en_reference: Whoa!

entries.speaker: 兵士Ｂ
entries.source_text: What's wrong，Noemi? If something's botherin' you，we'll help!
entries.vi_text: Sao vậy Noemi‚ nếu có chuyện gì làm cô khổ sở thì bọn tôi sẽ giúp!
entries.ja_source:
なんだよノエミちゃん、
困ってることがあるなら俺たちが力になるぜ！
entries.en_reference: What's wrong, Noemi? If something's botherin' you, we'll help!

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text:
What's botherin' me is! That you all! Come get treated! Even when
you're perfectly fine!
entries.vi_text:
Điều làm em khổ sở là! Mọi người! Dù
vẫn khỏe re! Lại cứ đến chữa trị đó ạ!
entries.ja_source:
わたしが困ってるのは！
みなさんがっ！　元気なのにっ！　ちりょーにくることですっ！
entries.en_reference:
What's botherin' me is! That you all! Come get treated! Even when
you're perfectly fine!

entries.speaker: 兵士Ａ
entries.source_text:
Gah! Busted...! Well，um，I just really wanted you to treat me，Miss
Noemi...
entries.vi_text:
Ặc… bị phát hiện rồi…! Chuyện là… tôi chỉ
muốn được cô Noemi chữa trị bằng mọi giá nên…
entries.ja_source:
げっ……バレてる……！
そのー、どうしてもノエミさんの治療が受けたくて……
entries.en_reference:
Gah! Busted...! Well, um, I just really wanted you to treat me, Miss
Noemi...

entries.speaker: 兵士Ｂ
entries.source_text: Sorry for makin' you so busy...
entries.vi_text: Xin lỗi vì đã khiến cô bận rộn quá…
entries.ja_source: 忙しくさせたのは悪かったよぉ……
entries.en_reference: Sorry for makin' you so busy...

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Me bein' busy，tha's toootally fine! I'm wooooorried about you all!
entries.vi_text: Em bận thì không sao hết ạ! Em lo cho mọi người cơ!
entries.ja_source:
わたしがいそがしーのは、別にいーんれすっ！
みなさんが！　しんぱいなんですぅっ！
entries.en_reference: Me bein' busy, tha's toootally fine! I'm wooooorried about you all!

entries.speaker: 兵士Ａ
entries.source_text: ...You're worried about us?
entries.vi_text: …Cô lo cho bọn tôi?
entries.ja_source: ……俺たちが心配？
entries.en_reference: ...You're worried about us?

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text:
If you keep lyin' sayin' you're hurt all the time，then when you really
do get badly hurt，no one'll believe youuu!
entries.vi_text:
Nếu lúc nào cũng nói dối là bị thương rồi~ thì
đến khi bị thương thật nặng sẽ không ai tin đâu!
entries.ja_source:
いつもいつも、けがをした～！　なんてうそを言ってたら、
ほんとーにおおけがしたとき、信じてもらえないのぉっ！
entries.en_reference:
If you keep lyin' sayin' you're hurt all the time, then when you really
do get badly hurt, no one'll believe youuu!

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text:
If injuwies get put off 'cause of that，people could die，y'know! I'm
worwied about that!
entries.vi_text:
Rồi nếu bị xếp sau thì có thể chết
mất đó! Em lo chuyện đó lắm đấy ạ!
entries.ja_source:
それで後回しにされたら、死んじゃうかもしれないでしょー！
わらひは、それがしんぱいなんれすよっ！
entries.en_reference:
If injuwies get put off 'cause of that, people could die, y'know! I'm
worwied about that!

entries.speaker: 兵士Ａ
entries.source_text: Even though she's so busy，she's thinking about us，not herself...!
entries.vi_text: Bận rộn như vậy mà cô ấy vẫn nghĩ cho bọn mình chứ không phải cho bản thân…!?
entries.ja_source: あんなに忙しくても、自分じゃなくて俺たちのことを考えて……！？
entries.en_reference: Even though she's so busy, she's thinking about us, not herself...!

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Lis'en up，good kids，evewyone! No lying! 'Kay，repeat after me!
entries.vi_text: Nghe rõ chưa‚ các bé ngoan! Không được nói dối! Nào‚ nhắc lại!
entries.ja_source:
いーですか、いいこのみんな！
うそはダメ！　はい、ふくしょ～！
entries.en_reference: Lis'en up, good kids, evewyone! No lying! 'Kay, repeat after me!

entries.speaker: 兵士たち
entries.source_text: N-no lying!
entries.vi_text: K-không được nói dối!
entries.ja_source: う、嘘はダメ！
entries.en_reference: N-no lying!

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Goooood! Evewyone's such good kids!
entries.vi_text: Tốt lắm! Mọi người đều là bé ngoan hết đó ạ!
entries.ja_source:
よろひい！　
みーんな、とってもいい子れすうっ！
entries.en_reference: Goooood! Evewyone's such good kids!

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text:
I'mma work even hawder as a healer，so evewyone，wet's work hard
together!
entries.vi_text:
Em cũng sẽ cố gắng hơn nữa với tư cách
healer nên mọi người cũng cùng cố gắng nhé~!
entries.ja_source:
わらひもひーらーとして、もぉぉぉっとがんばるので、
みんなもがんばりまひょ～！
entries.en_reference:
I'mma work even hawder as a healer, so evewyone, wet's work hard
together!

entries.speaker: 兵士Ａ
entries.source_text: Miss Noemi...
entries.vi_text: Cô Noemi…
entries.ja_source: ノエミさん……
entries.en_reference: Miss Noemi...

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: ...You drunken fools. Did you hear what Noemi said?
entries.vi_text: …Lũ say xỉn các cậu. Có nghe Noemi nói không?
entries.ja_source:
……この酔っぱらいども。
ノエミの話を聞いたか？
entries.en_reference: ...You drunken fools. Did you hear what Noemi said?

entries.speaker: 兵士Ｂ
entries.source_text: Ah，Commander...!
entries.vi_text: A‚ Chỉ Huy…!
entries.ja_source: あ、司令官……！
entries.en_reference: Ah, Commander...!

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
Drunk words show true feelings，so this must be how Noemi feels. So
what'll it be? You gonna keep causing her trouble?
entries.vi_text:
Người ta nói khi say sẽ lộ lòng thật nên đây hẳn là cảm xúc thật của
Noemi. Giờ sao đây‚ từ nay các cậu vẫn định gây phiền cho Noemi à?
entries.ja_source:
酔った時には本音が出るというし、これがノエミの本当の気持ちだろう。
どうするんだ、これからもノエミに迷惑をかけるつもりか？
entries.en_reference:
Drunk words show true feelings, so this must be how Noemi feels. So
what'll it be? You gonna keep causing her trouble?

entries.speaker: 兵士Ａ
entries.source_text:
No... I'll only rely on Miss Noemi when I've fought hard and gotten
injured...
entries.vi_text:
Không… tôi sẽ chỉ dựa vào cô Noemi khi đã
chiến đấu hết sức và bị thương thật thôi…
entries.ja_source:
いえ……ノエミさんに甘えるのは、
頑張って戦って怪我をした時だけにします……
entries.en_reference:
No... I'll only rely on Miss Noemi when I've fought hard and gotten
injured...

entries.speaker: 兵士Ｃ
entries.source_text:
Can't go causing trouble for such a sweet girl. Hehe... She said she
was worried about us...
entries.vi_text:
Không thể gây phiền cho cô gái tốt bụng như
vậy được. Hehe… cô ấy nói lo cho bọn mình kìa…
entries.ja_source:
こんないい子に迷惑かけられねえな。
へへ……俺たちが心配なんだってよ……
entries.en_reference:
Can't go causing trouble for such a sweet girl. Hehe... She said she
was worried about us...

entries.source_text:
Though the men were chastened，they each smiled and contentedly
raised their glasses.
entries.vi_text:
Những người đàn ông vừa tự kiểm điểm vừa
mỉm cười rồi thỏa mãn nghiêng ly uống.
entries.ja_source:
男たちは反省しながらも、
それぞれに笑みを浮かべて、満足げにグラスを傾けた。
entries.en_reference:
Though the men were chastened, they each smiled and contentedly
raised their glasses.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Looks like that settles it. No one can beat Noemi's kindness，huh?
entries.vi_text: Vậy là có vẻ ổn rồi. Quả nhiên không ai thắng nổi sự dịu dàng của Noemi nhỉ.
entries.ja_source:
これで問題なさそうだな。
やはりノエミの優しさには誰も勝てないか。
entries.en_reference: Looks like that settles it. No one can beat Noemi's kindness, huh?

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Lord Commander!
entries.vi_text: Chỉ Huy~!
entries.ja_source: 司令官さま～！
entries.en_reference: Lord Commander!

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Uwah!
entries.vi_text: Uwaa!?
entries.ja_source: うわっ！？
entries.en_reference: Uwah!

entries.source_text:
Noemi hugged the Commander's arm tightly. Leaning on his shoulder，
she spoke in a sweet voice.
entries.vi_text:
Noemi ôm chặt lấy cánh tay Chỉ Huy. Cô cứ thế
tựa vào vai anh rồi nói bằng giọng nũng nịu.
entries.ja_source:
ぎゅっ！　と、ノエミがの腕を抱いた。
そのまま肩へと寄りかかり、甘えた声で言う。
entries.en_reference:
Noemi hugged the Commander's arm tightly. Leaning on his shoulder,
she spoke in a sweet voice.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Ehe... Lord Commander，fank you for evewything...
entries.vi_text: Ehe~… Chỉ Huy‚ cảm ơn anh vì mọi chuyện~.
entries.ja_source: えへ～……司令官さま、いつもありがとう～。
entries.en_reference: Ehe... Lord Commander, fank you for evewything...

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: ...I should be the one thanking you. Noemi，you're drunk.
entries.vi_text: …Người phải cảm ơn là anh mới đúng. Noemi‚ em say rồi đấy.
entries.ja_source:
……礼を言うのはこっちのほうだ。
ノエミ、酔ってるな。
entries.en_reference: ...I should be the one thanking you. Noemi, you're drunk.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: 'M not dwunk... Love you，Lord Commander.
entries.vi_text: Em hông say đâu~. Em thích anh lắm‚ Chỉ Huy~.
entries.ja_source:
よってまへんよぉ～。
だいすきです、しれいかんさま～。
entries.en_reference: 'M not dwunk... Love you, Lord Commander.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Geez. Tell me that again when you're sober.
entries.vi_text: Thiệt là. Câu đó hãy để lúc không say rồi nói lại cho anh nghe.
entries.ja_source:
ったく。
その言葉は酔ってない時に、また聞かせてくれ。
entries.en_reference: Geez. Tell me that again when you're sober.

entries.speaker: ノエミ
entries.source_text: Well... just a little longer... please... Ehehe.
entries.vi_text: Chuyện đó thì… em muốn anh chờ thêm chút nữa thôi… ehe~.
entries.ja_source:
それはあ……、
もうちょっとだけ待ってほしいです……えへ～。
entries.en_reference: Well... just a little longer... please... Ehehe.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: ...Yeah，I'm looking forward to it.
entries.vi_text: …Ừ‚ anh mong chờ đấy.
entries.ja_source: ……ああ、楽しみにしてるよ。
entries.en_reference: ...Yeah, I'm looking forward to it.
